# colombanatsea.com

> Colomban at Sea — The digital headquarters of the triple maritime transition.

Colomban is a French merchant navy officer turned maritime transformation leader. His work spans three axes: technological transition (AI, data analytics), ecological transition (decarbonation, marine renewable energy), and sociocultural revolution (seafarer empowerment, maritime heritage).

## Key Concepts

- Oceanocratie / Oceanocraty: A vision where society builds resilience through a conscious relationship with the ocean. Unlike thalassocracy (power over the sea), oceanocraty means power with the sea.
- Triple maritime transition: Technology + Environment + Society as an interconnected system.
- MERitoire: A French portmanteau (mer + territoire) describing France's maritime territory — the 2nd largest EEZ in the world (11M km2), spanning 4 oceans, 5 continents, 37 maritime neighbors.

## Engagements

- GASPE: General Delegate — public maritime service operators association
- VAIATA Dynamics: Co-founder — AI for maritime search & rescue and cyber defense
- Opsealog: Initial design & former Head of Innovation — maritime data analytics
- Fondation ENSM: Board President — French National Maritime Academy foundation
- ENSM: Lecturer in sustainable development
- HYDROS Alumni: Deputy Secretary General — ENSM students and alumni network
- Propeller Club: Active member
- Apéritifs de la Mer: Ambassador
- Académie de Marine: Auditor
- FNMM: Member — French National Federation of Maritime Merit
- COESPC: Board member — local engagement in Annecy-le-Vieux
